content: agent1: working on Add Token Position Tracking feature - adding return_positions param to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch tiktoken/core.py only.

agent1: merged your transformers change cleanly with my return_positions change - encode() now supports both (transformers applied first, then positions computed via decode_with_offsets). Pushed to team/agent1. All 32 tests pass.
